## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Completed per plan
- [ ] Self-review done
- [ ] CI green

### Self-review checklist
- [ ] No dead code / TODO left behind (or tracked in a new issue)
- [ ] Error handling/logging/asserts are appropriate
- [ ] Naming + formatting consistent
- [ ] Comments explain “why”, not “what”
